headline: Conagra invests $220M to expand Arkansas manufacturing plant
summary: The frozen food maker is set to grow its chicken production capacity as it sees substantial growth in high-protein offerings.

raw.headline: Conagra invests $220M to expand Arkansas manufacturing plant
raw.summary: The frozen food maker is set to grow its chicken production capacity as it sees substantial growth in high-protein offerings.

headline: Conagra Brands invests in US poultry factory
summary: The company said that the expansion will “significantly increase” chicken production capacity at the Fayetteville plant.

raw.headline: Conagra Brands invests in US poultry factory
raw.summary: The company said that the expansion will “significantly increase” chicken production capacity at the Fayetteville plant.
